professional_summary: Web3 Content Creator & Community Architect with 2+ years of experience in technical trading, community building, and algorithm optimization. Expert in developing custom Telegram/X bots and leveraging Python automation for social media growth.

experience.title: Web3 Content Creator & Community Architect
experience.description: Technical trading, community building, X algorithm optimization, custom Telegram/X bots development via Render

cover_letter_template:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the {job_title} position at {company}. As a Web3 Content Creator & Community Architect with 2+ years of experience in technical trading, community building, and automation, I am confident that my skills and experience make me an excellent candidate for this role.

My expertise includes Python (Pyrogram, Telethon, Tweepy), Next.js, Three.js, Linux, and Playwright, along with deep knowledge of Web3, DeFi, SocialFi, InfoFi, and NFTs. I have successfully built custom Telegram/X bots and optimized social media algorithms for community growth.

I am particularly drawn to this opportunity because it aligns perfectly with my expertise in Web3 technologies and community building. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background would be a great fit for your team.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Comrade XBT
